title: MyOwnMod382
description: A very cool mod, adds new structures, a very cool mob and new items
body:
This mod adds 2 new structures, a mob, new discs and a new item and very cute block.

-FEATURES:

-Cool Lizard: 
A very cool mob that can be tamed with any type of flower, once tamed it will defend its owner by throwing emeralds, it also has very cool sound effects

-Heart Ore: 
A new mineral with magical abilities, when used it will give you absorption, it can be improved by using 8 gold ingots to improve its effects

-Companion Cube (from portal): 
A very cuddly new block, it can be crafted using 4 quartz heart ore and 4 iron nuggets, right clicking it will tame any nearby tameable animal

-New Discs: 

*Kevin MacLeod: Pixel Peeker Polka 

*C418: Dog

-New structures:

*Brick pyramid: A very large pyramid made of bricks, its interior is a labyrinth and hides a great treasure

*Starting House: An old house with useful loot
